mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat (session_id, row_no, col_no, seat_type, price, status, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{rowNo}, #{colNo}, #{seatType}, #{price}, #{status}, #{createTime})

INSERT INTO seat (session_id, row_no, col_no, seat_type, price, status, create_time) VALUES
(#{seat.sessionId}, #{seat.rowNo}, #{seat.colNo}, #{seat.seatType}, #{seat.price}, #{seat.status}, #{seat.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, row_no, col_no, seat_type, price, status, create_time FROM seat WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY row_no ASC, col_no ASC
